creator: larse@isi.edu
text:
After installing /usr/ports/www/netscape47-navigator, running netscape 
results in: ld.so failed: Can't find shared library "libXt.so.6.0"

ldd says:
/usr/local/lib/netscape/navigator-4.7.bin:
        -lXt.6 => not found (0x0)
        -lXmu.6 => not found (0x0)
        -lXext.6 => not found (0x0)
        -lX11.6 => not found (0x0)
        -lSM.6 => not found (0x0)
        -lICE.6 => not found (0x0)
        -lg++.4 => /usr/lib/compat/aout/libg++.so.4.0 (0x20684000)
        -lstdc++.2 => /usr/lib/compat/aout/libstdc++.so.2.0 (0x206c0000)
        -lm.2 => /usr/lib/compat/aout/libm.so.2.0 (0x206f6000)
        -lc.3 => /usr/lib/compat/aout/libc.so.3.1 (0x20710000)

(System was installed from the 4.0-20000214-CURRENT ISO CD image.)

How-To-Repeat: see description
